Home.hero_subtitle: Elevate your visit with premium, direct-booking accommodation in the heart of Madinah. Experience impeccable comfort without the hidden platform fees of Airbnb.
Home.pillar1_desc: Always cheaper than equivalent platforms. No markups, just honest and transparent value.
Home.pillar2_desc: Strategically located in Madinah offering seamless, short transit to the Prophet's Mosque.
Home.pillar3_desc: Hotel-grade cleanliness and pristine comfort, vetted rigorously for the discerning traveler.
Home.pillar4_desc: Zero platform fees. Instant direct confirmation for ultimate peace of mind.
Home.things_desc: Curated experiences, sacred sites, and local favorites just steps away from your premium accommodation.
Home.compare_sub: Why paying a middleman doesn't make sense for your trip.
Home.platform1_desc: Up to 20% added to your final bill at checkout.
Home.platform2_desc: Varying hosts mean unpredictable hygiene and comfort.
Home.platform3_desc: Algorithms double the price during peak seasons.
Home.direct1_desc: What you see is exactly what you pay. Zero fees.
Home.direct2_desc: Professionally managed to luxury boutique levels.
Home.direct3_desc: A dedicated concierge team, not a remote host.
Home.tours_desc: Your spiritual journey doesn't end at your room. Journey through the Prophet's city with our deeply knowledgeable local guides for an unforgettable experience.

About.title: About Us
About.p1: At My Stay In Madinah, our mission is to elevate your spiritual journey by providing premium, frictionless accommodation in the heart of the Prophet's city.
About.p2: We noticed a growing frustration with traditional booking platforms—hidden service fees, unpredictable hosts, and inflated pricing. We created this platform as a direct alternative, allowing you to bypass the middleman and secure luxury rooms at the absolute best guaranteed rate.
About.p3: From impeccably designed rooms to curated guided tours led by knowledgeable local guides, we handle the details so you can focus entirely on your worship and peace of mind.

Rooms.title: Our Premium Rooms
Rooms.subtitle: Experience boutique luxury in Madinah. Book direct to guarantee the lowest rate without hidden platform fees.

Tours.title: Curated Madinah Experiences
Tours.subtitle: Discover the rich spiritual heritage of Madinah with our deeply knowledgeable local guides. All tours include free cancellation up to 24 hours before your experience.
Tours.cancellation: Book with confidence: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before start (local time).

Contact.hero_sub: Reach out directly and skip platform fees entirely. Our concierge team responds promptly — usually within the hour.
Contact.get_in_touch_sub: Choose the channel that suits you best. All inquiries receive a personal response.
Contact.guarantee: Book direct and we guarantee the lowest available rate — no platform surcharges, no hidden fees.
Contact.form_sub: Fill in the form below and we'll come back to you with a personalised quote.
Contact.form_message_placeholder: Let us know how we can make your visit perfect...

Footer.copyright: © 2026 My Stay in Madinah. All rights reserved.

Success.title: Booking Confirmed
Success.desc: Alhamdulillah, your payment was successful and your room is secured. We have sent a confirmation email with your booking details. We look forward to welcoming you to Madinah.

Cancel.title: Checkout Cancelled
Cancel.desc: Your booking process was interrupted and no charges were made. The hold on your room has been released. You can try booking again whenever you are ready.
